scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/coc-memory -w packages/coc-workflow -w packages/forge -w packages/coc -w packages/coc-desktop
scripts.test:packages: npm run test:run -w packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run test:run -w packages/coc-workflow && npm run test:run -w packages/forge && npm run test:run -w packages/coc-client && npm run test:run -w packages/coc-memory && npm run test:run -w packages/coc && npm run test:run -w packages/deep-wiki && npm run test:run -w packages/coc-desktop
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage -w packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run coverage -w packages/coc-workflow && npm run coverage -w packages/forge && npm run coverage -w packages/coc-client && npm run coverage -w packages/coc-memory && npm run coverage -w packages/coc && npm run coverage -w packages/deep-wiki
scripts.coverage:diff: npm run coverage:diff -w packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/coc-workflow && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/forge && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/coc-client && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/coc-memory && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/coc && npm run coverage:diff -w packages/deep-wiki
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run build -w packages/coc-workflow && npm run build -w packages/forge && npm run build -w packages/coc-client && npm run build -w packages/coc-memory && npm run build -w packages/coc-connector && npm run build -w packages/coc && npm run build -w packages/deep-wiki && npm run build -w packages/coc-desktop
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w packages/coc && npm run build -w packages/coc-desktop && npm run start -w packages/coc-desktop
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w packages/coc && npm run build -w packages/coc-desktop && npm run rebuild:native -w packages/coc-desktop && npm run dist -w packages/coc-desktop
scripts.coc:link: cd packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run build && cd ../coc-workflow && npm run build && npm link && cd ../forge && npm run build && npm link && cd ../coc-client && npm run build && cd ../coc-connector && npm run build && cd ../coc && npm run build && npm link && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules/@plusplusoneplusplus/forge', {recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.deep-wiki:link: cd packages/deep-wiki && npm run build && npm link
scripts.publish-packages: npm run build -w packages/coc-agent-sdk && npm run build -w packages/coc-workflow && npm run build -w packages/forge && npm run build -w packages/coc-client && npm run build -w packages/coc-memory && npm run build -w packages/coc && npm run build:bundle -w packages/deep-wiki && changeset publish
